pitch.title: Neon Memories
pitch.core_theme: The fragility of truth and the ultimate price of memory.
pitch.logline: In a sprawling space colony where memories are currency, a hardboiled detective with amnesia must solve his partner's murder before his finite supply of memory-retaining sticky notes runs out.
pitch.synopsis:
Act 1: Detective Vance navigates the neon-lit slums of Neo-Ceres. He suffers from a neural-wipe, relying entirely on vintage Post-It notes to retain new memories. When his partner is murdered, Vance finds a single yellow note on the body with a cryptic clue.

Act 2: Vance investigates the corrupt megacorporation that manufactures the notes, realizing they are artificially inducing amnesia in the populace to sell the cure. As his note supply dwindles, he must choose which clues to keep and which to forget, leading to a tense cat-and-mouse game with corporate assassins.

Act 3: Down to his last note, Vance confronts the CEO. He sacrifices his own chance at a permanent cure to broadcast the corporation's conspiracy to the colony, leaving himself a final note to remind him that he did the right thing.

stage2_outline.title: Neon Memories
stage2_outline.logline: In a sprawling space colony where memories are currency, a hardboiled detective with amnesia must solve his partner's murder before his finite supply of memory-retaining sticky notes runs out.

act_1.sequence_number_and_title: Sequence 1: The World of Forgotten Things

beats.description: Detective Vance wakes up in a neon-lit slum of Neo-Ceres and reads a wall of sticky notes just to remember his own name.
Vance is called to a crime scene only to discover the victim is his own partner, clutching a blood-stained yellow note with a cryptic corporate cipher.
Vance leverages his underworld contacts to decode the cipher, but every answer requires him to overwrite an old memory note.
A low-level informant points the cipher to the monolithic MemoryCorp, forcing Vance to step out of the slums and into the dangerous corporate sector.
Vance infiltrates a MemoryCorp distribution hub and discovers anomalies in the supply chain of memory-retaining notes.
Corporate assassins ambush Vance in the archives, confirming he is on the right track but forcing him to burn precious notes to escape.
Following the assassins' trail, Vance breaks into a hidden laboratory where citizens are secretly dosed with amnesia-inducing chemicals.

Vance accesses the mainframe and realizes the corporation creates the disease to sell the cure, therefore making him a massive threat, but the alarm sounds and his note supply dwindles to a critical handful.
The CEO dispatches elite cleaners to erase Vance permanently, turning the neon streets into a deadly cat-and-mouse hunt.
Vance must discard notes containing his only memories of his deceased wife in order to record the access codes needed to expose the corporation.
The cleaners corner Vance in an alley, destroying his backup stash of notes and leaving him disoriented and bleeding.
Down to his final three notes, Vance uses his detective instincts to piece together his location and the CEO's penthouse coordinates, resolving into a suicide mission.
Vance uses his penultimate note to bypass the penthouse security grid, fighting his way through the final line of corporate defense.
Vance breaches the inner sanctum and holds the CEO at gunpoint, demanding access to the colony-wide broadcast network.
The CEO offers Vance a permanent cure for his neural-wipe if he walks away, but Vance rejects the offer and triggers the broadcast, exposing the conspiracy to all of Neo-Ceres.
As his memory begins to fade, Vance uses his very last sticky note to write down that he did the right thing, sticking it to his chest as he looks out over the newly awakened city.
